other_observers: Bill Maynard; Bill Maynard if it is the dame bird
description: A Plegadis ibis in Breeding Plumage. The main difference was in the face and legs. The legs were grayish. The facial skin was grayish-blue bordered by pale blue. The eye was very dark brown. See photo for exact distribution.Behaviors: Feeding and preening with other 60 Pleagadis ibisCall: None notedPlumage: Adult Alternate
